procedures.name: Open reduction with internal fixation of right mandibular subcondylar fracture
procedures.evidence_span: The right mandible was repositioned with internal fixation device using an open approach to address the subcondylar fracture

procedures.name: External fixation of left maxilla and left mandible via percutaneous approach
procedures.evidence_span: the left maxilla and left mandible were repositioned with external fixation devices via percutaneous approach to stabilize the facial skeleton

procedures.name: Repair of intercostal artery via open approach
procedures.evidence_span: An upper artery repair was performed via open approach to control hemorrhage from the lacerated intercostal vessels

procedures.name: Influenza vaccination
procedures.evidence_span: The patient received influenza vaccination during hospitalization
